title: Automations - "Overdue" status with exceeded Deadline
excerpt:
Hi there, 
i was wondering if there is a way to setup an automation in order to change the status of a pulse when a deadline is exceeded. 
Do you have any idea on how to accomplish it? 
Cheers

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

i was wondering if there is a way to setup an automation in order to change the status of a pulse when a deadline is exceeded.

Do you have any idea on how to accomplish it?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Paolo,

I am using this one

image1046×95 4.99 KB

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems working like a charm.

Unfortunately at the moment Monday doesn’t allow us to set two different status conditions at the same time and this is useful when you have for example a “Stuck” status.

Maybe with the 2.0 release they will add this options.

In the main time, thanks a lot for the hint.
